mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM hotel_kiosk.room_master WHERE room_status = 'active'
SELECT count(*) FROM hotel_kiosk.room_status WHERE current_status = 'Occupied'
SELECT count(*) FROM hotel_kiosk.reservations WHERE check_in_at = DATE(NOW())
SELECT count(*) FROM hotel_kiosk.reservations WHERE checkin_date = DATE(NOW()) AND check_in_at IS NULL
SELECT count(*) FROM hotel_kiosk.stocks WHERE stock_status = 'Shortage' OR stock_status = 'Warning'
SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.stocks WHERE stock_status = 'Shortage' OR stock_status = 'Warning'

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN pay_status = 'Success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Success, SUM(CASE WHEN pay_status = 'Waiting' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Waiting, SUM(CASE WHEN pay_status IN ('Refund', 'Failed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled FROM hotel_kiosk.reservations

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN current_status = 'Available' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Available, SUM(CASE WHEN current_status = 'Occupied' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Occupied, SUM(CASE WHEN current_status = 'Cleaning' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Cleaning, SUM(CASE WHEN current_status = 'Cleaning Required' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Cleaning_Required, SUM(CASE WHEN current_status = 'Maintenance' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Maintenance FROM hotel_kiosk.room_status
